description: Use this API to set parameters for harmonics load data user model IEEE_IM. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5.0. ierr = har_set_par_lodmdl_ieee_im(ibus,id,realar)

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying Refer model schematic diagram in PAG Harmonics chapter for information on each real constant. (input).

realar.description: Real Constant K1 (0.8 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘k1’.
Real Constant KM (1.2 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘km’.
Real Constant XM (0.15 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘xm’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: load not found.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: model HTYP not allowed.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: model does not take parameters.
